_help: One external claim, one file: records/claims/CLM-NNNN.json (schema/record.claim.schema.json). Exploded from the V1 docs/CLAIMS.json monolith by `gen migrate-claims` (M4c) — `slug` preserves the V1 id. Field semantics are V1's: statement/type/build_state/blast_radius always; existential claims add de_risk_milestone; novelty/competitive/market claims add prior_art_checked + how_we_differ; every citation says WHY it supports (supports_because). CLAIM rules activate at descriptor maturity 'claimed'.
statement: <the claim, exactly as asserted to the outside world>

citations.supports_because: <why this source supports the claim — a bare link is not evidence>
